title: VS Code LSP client, document outline, and status integration

source.subject: chore: bump compiler and pckg submodules; VS Code extension runtime, LSP client, outline, status

body:
## Outcome

Bump compiler and pckg submodules; VS Code extension runtime, LSP client, outline, status.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
